Class AsyncApi21DocumentImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.RootNodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v2x.v21.AsyncApi21DocumentImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApiDocument, AsyncApiExtensible, AsyncApi2xDocument, AsyncApi2xExtensible, AsyncApi21Document, AsyncApi21Extensible, Document, Extensible, Node, RootNode, Visitable
public class AsyncApi21DocumentImpl extends RootNodeImpl implements AsyncApi21Document
